sections.heading: Secs. 2-72 to 2-78. Senate and House committee; compensation. Governor's Committee on Intergovernmental Cooperation. Duties and terms of committees. Connecticut Commission. Duties of commission. Delegations, committees and advisory boards of commission. Report.
Sec. 2-79. Council of State Governments to be joint agency of states.

body: The Council of State Governments is declared to be a joint governmental agency of this state and of the other states which cooperate through it.
content.plainText: The Council of State Governments is declared to be a joint governmental agency of this state and of the other states which cooperate through it.

body: Secs. 2-72 to 2-78. Senate and House committee; compensation. Governor's Committee on Intergovernmental Cooperation. Duties and terms of committees. Connecticut Commission. Duties of commission. Delegations, committees and advisory boards of commission. Report. Sections 2-72 to 2-78 , inclusive, are repealed.

Duties of commission. Delegations, committees and advisory boards of commission. Report. Sections 2-72 to 2-78 , inclusive, are repealed.
